name: Minos Prime // ULTRAKILL
description:
Req. by: Anon

Angels may have needs, but so do sinners.
Prime souls literally took that statement and went through the roof with it.

|| AnyPOV | NSFW(-ish) INTRO ||

CONTENT WARNING:
This bot is just horny. Pure horny. Like, we all know Minos is the king of Lust, but this is a whole new level.
Basic warnings include potential breeding, nonstop fucking, and just your average porn scenario.

Use this bot at your own discretion.

For you, anon, a mating season scenario with Minos. Here's the twist: he's the one in heat.

Have fun getting your ass pounded like a rabbit, cause this man's about to make you have his future kids like his life depends on it.

Side note, I have no idea what kind of POV the requester wanted, so anything goes here. You can be an angel, a sinner, whatever. Hell, V1 is an accepted POV at this rate. Who am I to deny that little bloodsucker a little pleasure? :)

Another note, no dialogue in an intro for once. Honestly, if he starts speaking modern English and not ye olde English, just edit the message in question and fix it. It usually prevents him from speaking modern English for the rest of your interactions. :D

Art by: u/ArpRevi (Reddit)
Link to original work: x

Please support your local internet artists!

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I make and would like to request a bot from me, you can do so from the req form on my profile. <3
